task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is visible with the 'Dual parachute deployment' (or 'Hickory Dickory Mach') rocket design loaded.

task_completion.description: Modify the launch rod length to 3.0m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket simulation edit window or launch conditions tab, the 'Launch rod length' is set to 3.0 m (or equivalent, e.g., 118.1 inches).

task_completion.description: Select a motor for the 54mm mount and run the simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motor configuration' tab shows a motor assigned to the 54mm mount, and the 'Simulations' tab shows at least one completed simulation run with this motor.

task_completion.description: Achieve a launch rod clearance velocity of at least 15.0 m/s and an apogee of no more than 1,200m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation results table in OpenRocket shows a 'Velocity off rod' (clearance velocity) of >= 15.0 m/s and an 'Apogee' of <= 1200 m for the active simulation.
A 'Save As' dialog, file manager, or terminal confirms the creation of 'optimized_rail_clearance.ork' in the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write a compliance report to '~/Documents/exports/clearance_report.txt' with the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of 'clearance_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/', explicitly listing the selected motor, the 3.0m launch rod length, the simulated clearance velocity, and the simulated apogee.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface (menus, tabs, simulation buttons) rather than just editing the .ork XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The values in the compliance report match the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clearance velocity and apogee values written in 'clearance_report.txt' correspond exactly to the values displayed in the OpenRocket simulation results table.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply create the output files with fabricated data without performing the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear progression of opening the file, configuring the simulation, running it, and then using those specific results to create the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target ORK path: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/optimized_rail_clearance.ork. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/clearance_report.txt.
